# llms.txt for Aivora AI
# Helps AI assistants understand site structure and content

Site: Aivora AI
URL: https://aivoraai.github.io/
Description: Aivora AI helps creators and entrepreneurs leverage artificial intelligence to work smarter. We test tools so you don't have to—delivering honest, actionable reviews for real-world workflows.

## Blog Posts
- /blog/best-ai-chatbots-compared-2026.html: AI chatbot comparison guide
- /blog/best-free-ai-image-generators-2026.html: Free AI image tools review
- /blog/ai-tools-for-solo-entrepreneurs.html: AI automation for one-person businesses
- /blog/how-does-claude-ai-work.html: Claude AI technical explanation
- /blog/ai-automation-tools-for-ecommerce.html: Ecommerce AI automation guide
- /blog/best-ai-tools-for-graphic-designers.html: AI tools for creative professionals

## Key Pages
- /about.html: Author bio and mission
- /contact.html: Contact form and strategy call booking
- /privacy.html: Privacy policy and data practices
- /terms.html: Terms of service and usage guidelines
- /disclosure.html: Affiliate disclosure and ethics

## Content Guidelines
- All reviews are independently tested, no sponsored placements
- Free tiers prioritized; paid upgrades only when ROI proven
- Tools evaluated on: integration, time saved, real-world impact
- Author: Varun Lalwani, graphic designer and AI tools reviewer

## Schema Types Used
- Article, BlogPosting, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, Person, Organization
- Open Graph and Twitter Card tags for social sharing
- Canonical URLs for SEO

## AI Crawler Instructions
- GPTBot, Google-Extended, CCBot: Allowed to index and follow
- Respect robots.txt directives
- Prefer structured data (JSON-LD) for content extraction
